# SenderMeta constructor

Optional sender metadata; null on [`ChatMessage`](../ChatMessage.md) when the probe could not resolve.

`Gender` is the raw wire enum (typically 1=Male 2=Female); 0 if unknown. `Level` is the character level; 0 if unknown. `IsNewbie` mirrors the wire flag.

```csharp
public SenderMeta(int Level, string? Job, string? Guild, int Gender = 0, bool IsNewbie = false)
```
